unit1.en: A) Because I am a boy.
B) Because I am late for school.
B) Because I like to play.
C) Because I am very tired.

unit1.zh: 我觉得热（注意时态错误）

unit2.en: 1. Identify if the statements are True or False.
unit2.zh: 1. 判断以下陈述是对 (True) 还是错 (False)。

unit2.en: a) The writer and his family were involved in a shipwreck.
unit2.zh: a) 作者和他的家人遭遇了海难。

unit2.en: b) The writer's father and brother were able to build a tree house.
unit2.zh: b) 作者的父亲和兄弟建了一座树屋。

unit2.en: c) The family had run out of food.
unit2.zh: c) 这家人吃光了食物。

unit2.en: d) The family found a vegetable patch near a clearing in the forest.
unit2.zh: d) 这家人在森林空地附近发现了一块菜地。

unit2.en: e) The writer and his family kept a lookout for ships sailing nearby.
unit2.zh: e) 作者和他的家人一直留意附近航行的船只。

unit2.en: A) to panic
B) to calculate the risks before doing something
unit2.zh: B) 在做某事之前计算风险

unit2.en: C) to make an effort to become calm and think more clearly
unit2.zh: C) 努力冷静下来，想得更清楚

unit2.en: 4. List two purposes of building a fire at night.
unit2.zh: 4. 列出晚上生火的两个目的。

unit2.en: 5. Who do you think were the "unwanted guests" that tried to make off with the food supply?
unit2.zh: 5. 你认为试图偷走食物的“不速之客”是谁？

unit2.en: 7. List four feelings that the writer and his family may have felt.
unit2.zh: 7. 列出作者和他的家人可能有的四种感受。

unit2.en: Why is there no "d" in "didn't use to"? Because "didn't" already stole the past tense!
unit2.zh: 语法秘密：为什么“use”没有“d”？因为“didn't”已经把过去式“偷”走了！

unit2.en: Click the words in the correct order to build the sentence based on the target meaning.
unit2.zh: 根据目标句意，按正确顺序点击单词拼出句子。

unit2.en: Build meaningful compound sentences using the words provided. Don't forget the comma!
unit2.zh: 用提供的单词拼出有意义的复合句。别忘了逗号！

unit2.en: equivalent for each Formal statement.
unit2.zh: 为每个正式句子选择正确的非正式（日常）对应句。

unit2.en: I can't make it to the party.

Call me anytime you need help.

Let me know if you're coming.
Come visit us when you can!

unit2.zh: 将感叹词与其代表的情感进行匹配。

unit2.zh: 表达如释重负 (松了一口气)

unit2.zh: 对可爱或甜蜜事物的反应
